{"credits": [{"type": "finder", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/2650170?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ViRb3/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ViRb3/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ViRb3/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ViRb3/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/ViRb3", "id": 2650170, "login": "ViRb3", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjI2NTAxNzA=", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ViRb3/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ViRb3/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ViRb3/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ViRb3/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ViRb3/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/ViRb3", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-32769", "cvss": {"score": 9.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 9.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 7.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:P/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:N/VA:N/SC:H/SI:H/SA:H"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-284", "name": "Improper Access Control"}], "description": "### Impact

Due to a mis-written NetworkPolicy, a malicious actor can pivot from a subverted application to any Pod out of the origin namespace.
This breaks the security-by-default property expected as part of the deployment program, leading to a potential lateral movement.

### Patch

Removing the `inter-ns` NetworkPolicy patches the vulnerability. If updates are not possible in production environments, we recommend to manually delete it and update as soon as possible.

### Workaround

Given your context, delete the failing network policy that should be prefixed by `inter-ns-` in the target namespace.
You can use the following to delete all matching network policy. If unsure of the outcome, please do it manually.

```bash
for ns in $(kubectl get ns -o jsonpath='{.items[*].metadata.name}' | tr ' ' '\n' | grep '^ns-'); do
  kubectl -n "$ns" get networkpolicy -o name \
  | grep '^networkpolicy.networking.k8s.io/inter-ns-' \
  | xargs -r kubectl -n "$ns" delete
done
```", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00501, "percentile": 0.39522}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-hxm7-9q36-c77f", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-03-16T20:47:15Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-hxm7-9q36-c77f", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-hxm7-9q36-c77f"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-32769"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-03-20T01:15:55Z", "published_at": "2026-03-16T20:47:15Z", "references": ["https://github.com/ctfer-io/fullchain/security/advisories/GHSA-hxm7-9q36-c77f", "https://github.com/ctfer-io/fullchain/commit/dbcb90178bcb07a3f5a1efa4c6350f3a6ce34f51", "https://github.com/ctfer-io/fullchain/releases/tag/v0.1.1", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-32769", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-hxm7-9q36-c77f"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/ctfer-io/fullchain/security-advisories/GHSA-hxm7-9q36-c77f", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/ctfer-io/fullchain", "summary": "Fullchain's Invalid NetworkPolicy enables a malicious actor to pivot into another namespace", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-24T20:28:36Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-hxm7-9q36-c77f", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.1.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/ctfer-io/fullchain"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.1.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: Fullchain's Invalid NetworkPolicy enables a malicious actor to pivot into another namespace
